summary: Completed testing for Iteration 126: Supplier-based Telemetry, Certification Funnel, and Error Tracking features. All 14 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend UI tests passed. New endpoints GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/suppliers and GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel work correctly. Error tracking fields (error_count, error_rate_pct, price_mismatch, supplier_unavailable, booking_timeout) are present in telemetry history. POST /api/e2e-demo/run correctly records error_type and error_categories for error scenarios.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/suppliers returns all 4 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil)
✅ Each supplier in telemetry/suppliers has counters and derived fields
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/suppliers requires authentication
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel returns all 4 suppliers
✅ Certification funnel has correct 4-stage structure per supplier (credential_added, sandbox_test_started, sandbox_test_passed, go_live_activated)
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel?supplier=ratehawk correctly filters
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel requires authentication
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history includes error tracking fields
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run price_mismatch scenario completed successfully
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run supplier_unavailable scenario recorded with failures
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run booking_timeout scenario recorded with failures
✅ Telemetry history correctly aggregates error counts
✅ Existing GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry endpoint works (no regression)
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run returns full data structure (no regression)
✅ Frontend: TelemetryCard with Tekil/Karsilastir toggle visible and working
✅ Frontend: All 4 supplier filter tabs (RateHawk, Paximum, TBO, WTatil) visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: Compare view shows all suppliers in TelemetryCard
✅ Frontend: CertificationTrendChart with Skor/Hatalar toggle visible
✅ Frontend: Error bar chart shows Price Mismatch, Timeout, Unavailable categories
✅ Frontend: Period toggles (Saatlik/Gunluk/Haftalik) visible and working
✅ Frontend: CertificationFunnel card visible with all 4 suppliers
✅ Frontend: Each supplier funnel shows 4 stages with completion progress bars
✅ Frontend: Run test button triggers test execution and displays results
critical_code_review_comments: sandbox_telemetry_service.py get_telemetry_all_suppliers() correctly iterates KNOWN_SUPPLIERS and aggregates counters per supplier

get_certification_funnel() correctly checks 4 stages: credential_added (from supplier_credentials), sandbox_test_started (test count > 0), sandbox_test_passed (go_live_eligible tests), go_live_activated (latest test eligible)
record_snapshot() correctly stores error_type and error_categories for error scenarios
get_telemetry_history() aggregation pipeline correctly sums error counts by type (price_mismatch_count, supplier_unavailable_count, booking_timeout_count)
Frontend TelemetryCard correctly toggles between single/compare views using useState
Frontend CertificationTrendChart correctly switches between AreaChart (score mode) and BarChart (errors mode)
Frontend CertificationFunnel renders stages with completion checkmarks and progress bars
seed_data_creation: Error scenario tests created snapshots with error_type values (price_mismatch, supplier_unavailable, booking_timeout)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 126 added 3 new features to Certification Console: 1) GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/suppliers returns telemetry broken down by each of 4 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil). 2) GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel returns funnel data per supplier with 4 stages (credential_added, sandbox_test_started, sandbox_test_passed, go_live_activated). 3) Error tracking in telemetry/history with fields: error_count, error_rate_pct, price_mismatch, supplier_unavailable, booking_timeout. Frontend components: TelemetryCard (data-testid='telemetry-card') with Tekil/Karsilastir toggle, CertificationTrendChart (data-testid='trend-chart-card') with Skor/Hatalar toggle showing error bar chart, CertificationFunnel (data-testid='certification-funnel') with per-supplier stage progress. Page URL: /app/admin/certification-console

api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/suppliers: ✅ 200 - Returns suppliers object with ratehawk, paximum, tbo, wtatil keys, each with counters and derived fields
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/certification-funnel: ✅ 200 - Returns funnels object with 4 stages per supplier
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history (err: ✅ 200 - Data points include error_count, error_rate_pct, price_mismatch, supplier_unavailable, booking_timeout
api_verification.POST /api/e2e-demo/run (supplier_unavail: ✅ 200 - Creates snapshot with error_type='supplier_unavailable', fail at search step
api_verification.POST /api/e2e-demo/run (booking_timeout): ✅ 200 - Creates snapshot with error_type='booking_timeout', fail at booking step

frontend_verification.TelemetryCard: data-testid='telemetry-card' - Tekil/Karsilastir toggle, 4 supplier filter tabs
frontend_verification.Telemetry Single View: Shows 4 metrics: Baglanti Denemeleri, Engellenen Olaylar, Simulasyon Calismalari, Sandbox Basarili
frontend_verification.Telemetry Compare View: data-testid='telemetry-compare-view' - Shows all 4 suppliers side by side
frontend_verification.Error Bar Chart: Shows stacked bars: Price Mismatch (orange), Unavailable (rose), Timeout (yellow)
frontend_verification.CertificationFunnel: data-testid='certification-funnel' - Shows all 4 suppliers with stage completion
frontend_verification.Funnel Stages: 4 stages per supplier: Credential Eklendi, Sandbox Test Basladi, Sandbox Test Gecti, Go-Live Aktif

mocked_apis.note: Supplier API calls are MOCKED/SIMULATED in e2e_demo_service.py - no real RateHawk/Paximum/TBO/WTatil API calls are made
